1782180.name: Metaisland
1782180.description:
🏝️ Welcome to Metaisland

The world has collapsed. History is erased, knowledge is lost, and strange alien crystals with unknown power now threaten humanity.

You wake up on a mysterious island where survival is the only law. Build, fight, explore, and earn your place in this unforgiving world.

Metaisland isn’t just another “crypto game.” It’s a full survival challenge that blends:

  • 🎯 Third-person shooting

  • 🧩 Exploration & puzzles

  • ⚔️ RPG & e-sport competitions

  • 🌴 Immersive survival gameplay

📖 The Story

An asteroid of crystalline alien matter struck Siberia, spreading microscopic shards across the planet. These crystals infect humans, twisting some into zombies, others into evolved beings with extraordinary powers.

Chinese billionaire Wolf Chang built a refuge island, enforcing strict quarantine to resist the infection. But over time, seven distinct mutant factions arose—each with their own leaders, powers, and philosophies.

Three of these factions are already chronicled in novels (Redcards, Tribes, Punks), with more to come. Each faction is tied to NFTs that grant players exclusive in-game abilities.

Metaisland is both a game and a growing metaverse—an evolving narrative and community shaped by its players.

⚡ Key Features

  • 🎭 150+ Playable Characters – survivors, fighters, mutants, and specialists

  • 🔫 30+ Weapons – from improvised tools to high-tech rocket launchers

  • 🌍 Immersive Jungle/Island World – full of traps, dangers, and opportunities

  • ⏳ Timed Challenges – climb leaderboards, compete, and prove your skill

  • 💎 WOLF Coin Play-to-Earn – earn by playing, trade when the token launches

  • 🆓 10 Free Onboarding Missions – no ads, no pay-to-win, just skill

💰 Earn WOLF Coins

WOLF is Metaisland’s in-game currency, fixed at $0.33 USD at launch.

  • 🎮 Complete Challenges → Earn WOLF for your performance

  • 🏆 Early Advantage → Coins earned now will convert into real crypto at launch

  • 💎 Future Utility → Buy in-game goods, NFTs, and unlock abilities

  • 💸 Exchange Ready → When the community grows, WOLF will be tradable on exchanges

The bigger the Metaisland community, the sooner WOLF goes live.

🚀 Join the Community

Metaisland is more than a game—it’s a living universe built by gamers, readers, and dreamers. Books, music, NFTs, and challenges all connect into one evolving story.

Talk about Metaisland, invite friends, share videos, and grow with us. The future of this island depends on you.

🌴 Survive. Explore. Fight. Earn. Welcome to Metaisland.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
